goal: Regression: after the avatar/cluster change the coin chip DISAPPEARED top-right (+ no avatar) post-login
done: Root cause = CSS/JS version SKEW: the avatar work moved .mt-coin-chip OUT of position:fixed into the cluster, but JS modules (meow-coin.js) load UNVERSIONED (1h edge cache) while CSS is versioned — new CSS (no fixed on coin) + stale JS (no cluster) left the coin unpositioned (behind header -> 'gone'). Fix (cache-proof): (1) RESTORED .mt-coin-chip{position:fixed;top;right;z-index} so STALE js still positions the coin; (2) cluster + coin in-cluster position(static, inline-overriding the restored fixed) + avatar layout all set via INLINE styles in meow-coin.js so FRESH js works regardless of CSS staleness; (3) avatar visibility via inline display (not [hidden], which inline display:flex would override). Verified real browser. Cache-bust 20260623f -> 20260623g; www synced.
fix: inline-position the top-right cluster/coin/avatar in JS (cache-proof) + restore .mt-coin-chip position:fixed CSS fallback for stale unversioned JS.
verified: real-browser daily signed-out: coin top:10/right:12 static in fixed cluster, avatar display none
real-browser simulated signed-in: avatar 34x34 left of coin
filed: DEPLOY GOTCHA: js/ modules imported UNVERSIONED (1h edge cache) while HTML/CSS carry ?v — JS fixes reach users up to ~1h late (or on hard-refresh); avoid coupling a versioned-CSS rule to unversioned-JS behaviour.
